rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: PowerShell/BITS Downloading File from Blob Storage

rules.rule_text:
title: PowerShell/BITS Downloading File from Blob Storage
id: fb04e413-1f0d-4c39-a25a-812050f39f44
description: Observed during pentest engagement, malicious PowerShell modules downloaded
  from blob storage provider
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson, Patrik Olson
date: '2022-11-23'
modified: '2023-06-18'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  objectstorage_misc:
    cs-host|endswith:
    - .linodeobjects.com
    - .digitaloceanspaces.com
    - .dream.io
    - .wasabisys.com
    - .vultrobjects.com
    - .backblazeb2.com
    - storageapi.fleek.co
    - .blob.core.windows.net
    - api.onedrive.com
  objectstorage_aws:
    cs-host|endswith: .amazonaws.com
    cs-host|re: \bs3\b
  useragent:
    c-useragent|contains:
    - BITS
    - Powershell
  filter:
    cs-host:
    - pscoretestdata.blob.core.windows.net
  condition: 1 of objectstorage* and useragent and not filter
falsepositives:
- true
level: medium
tags:
- attack.execution
